def positive_sorted_full_collection_to_extract_top_n_elements():
    rule_id = "sorted_full_collection_to_extract_top_n_elements"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "sorted() called on a full collection just to slice the first N elements; use heapq.nsmallest/nlargest."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
